title: Perforce VCS Driver: Initialize and Execute
interaction_flow: PerforceDriver::initialize() → reads repoConfig['depot'] and repoConfig['branch']
PerforceDriver::initialize() → initPerforce(repoConfig)
initPerforce() → Cache::isUsable(cache-vcs-dir) [throws RuntimeException if not usable]
initPerforce() → Perforce::create(repoConfig, url, repoDir, process, io) [static factory]
Perforce::create() → new Perforce(repoConfig, port, path, process, isWindows, io)
Perforce::__construct() → initializePath(path) → Filesystem::ensureDirectoryExists(path)
Perforce::__construct() → initialize(repoConfig) → generateUniquePerforceClientName() [gethostname()_time()]
initialize() → getP4variable('P4USER') via ProcessExecutor if p4user not in config
PerforceDriver::initialize() → perforce->p4Login()
p4Login() → queryP4User() → getP4variable('P4USER') or io->ask('Enter P4 User:')
p4Login() → isLoggedIn() → generateP4Command(['login','-s'], false) → executeCommand() → ProcessExecutor::execute()
p4Login() [if not logged in] → queryP4Password() → getP4variable('P4PASSWD') or io->askAndHideAnswer()
p4Login() [Windows] → windowsLogin(password) → new Process(['p4 login -a'], stdin=password) → process->run()
p4Login() [Linux] → new Process(['p4 login -a'], stdin=password) → process->run()
PerforceDriver::initialize() → perforce->checkStream()
checkStream() → generateP4Command(['depots'], false) → executeCommand() → ProcessExecutor::execute(p4 depots)
checkStream() → parses output, sets p4DepotType ('stream' or other), returns isStream()
PerforceDriver::initialize() → perforce->writeP4ClientSpec()
writeP4ClientSpec() → getP4ClientSpec() [path/client.p4.spec] → fopen(clientSpec, 'w')
writeP4ClientSpec() → writeClientSpecToFile(spec) [writes Client, Owner, Root, Stream/View fields]
PerforceDriver::initialize() → perforce->connectClient()
connectClient() → generateP4Command(['client','-i']) → new Process(command, stdin=file_get_contents(clientSpec)) → process->run()
--- Normal operation (getBranches, getTags, getFileContent) ---
PerforceDriver::getBranches() → perforce->getBranches()
getBranches() [stream] → generateP4Command(['streams','//depot/...']) → executeCommand() → parses stream names
getBranches() → generateP4Command(['changes', stream+'/...'], false) → executeCommand() → gets last changelist number
PerforceDriver::getTags() → perforce->getTags()
getTags() → generateP4Command(['labels']) → executeCommand() → parses Label lines
PerforceDriver::getFileContent(file, identifier) → perforce->getFileContent(file, identifier)
getFileContent() → getFilePath(file, identifier) → generateP4Command(['files', path], false) → executeCommand()
getFileContent() → generateP4Command(['print', path]) → executeCommand() → returns commandResult
--- Cleanup ---
PerforceDriver::cleanup() → perforce->cleanupClientSpec()
cleanupClientSpec() → getClient() → generateP4Command(['client','-d', client], false) → executeCommand() → ProcessExecutor::execute(p4 client -d)
cleanupClientSpec() → getP4ClientSpec() → Filesystem::remove(clientSpec)
PerforceDriver::cleanup() → perforce = null
key_relationships: Perforce composes ProcessExecutor (injected, used for all p4 command execution)
Perforce composes Filesystem (lazy-created via getFilesystem(), wraps ProcessExecutor)
Perforce uses IOInterface (for interactive user/password prompts)
Perforce uses Symfony Process (for p4 login -i, p4 login -a with stdin piping)
ProcessExecutor wraps process execution; Perforce::executeCommand() delegates to it
important_notes: Client name is 'composer_perforce_<hostname>_<time>_<streamName>'. Client spec file lives at <cache-vcs-dir>/<depot>/<client>.p4.spec. Stream depot type detected by p4 depots output. p4 login uses Symfony Process with stdin for password piping. PerforceDriver.cleanup() deletes the client spec via p4 client -d and removes the .p4.spec file from disk.
